info.title: imagegen
info.description: A .NET tool for generating images using Google Gemini API

options.name: --prompt
options.description: The text prompt to generate an image from

options.name: --output
options.description: The output path where the generated image will be saved

options.name: --api-key
options.description: Your Google Gemini API key for image generation. If not provided, will use GEMINI_API_KEY environment variable

options.name: --size
options.description: Image dimensions in WIDTHxHEIGHT format (e.g., 1024x1024, 512x768). Default is 1024x1024 [default: 1024x1024]
